title: All People Report to the Given Manager
description: Find all employee IDs who directly or indirectly report to manager_id = 1.
constraints: employee_id = 1 is the head manager — manager_id = 1 for themselves
Must exclude employee_id = 1 from the result
key_concept: Recursive CTE to traverse management hierarchy. Base: direct reports. Recursive: their reports.

hints.L1: This is a tree traversal. Use a recursive CTE.
hints.L2: Anchor: SELECT employee_id FROM Employees WHERE manager_id = 1 AND employee_id != 1. Recursive: JOIN on manager_id = cte.employee_id.
hints.L3: WITH RECURSIVE cte AS (SELECT employee_id FROM Employees WHERE manager_id = 1 AND employee_id != 1 UNION ALL SELECT e.employee_id FROM Employees e JOIN cte ON e.manager_id = cte.employee_id WHERE e.employee_id != 1) SELECT employee_id FROM cte
